Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1

Pls clarify why prometheus metric collection should be enabled by default?
AFAIK there is no usecase currently in ONAP for prometheus integration; this was discussed on DCAE call sometime back but dint see that formalized as requirement. Do you have corresponding REQ tracking this effort?

Patch Set 4:

> Patch Set 4: Code-Review-1
> 
> Pls clarify why prometheus metric collection should be enabled by default?
> AFAIK there is no usecase currently in ONAP for prometheus integration; this was discussed on DCAE call sometime back but dint see that formalized as requirement. Do you have corresponding REQ tracking this effort?

Hello Vijay, 
I was going to write you an email about this but I was caught up with other work, sorry for that. 
I talked to Sylvain on OOM weekly and there is already Prometheus integration implemented in OOM and there are already some ServiceMonitors added. So what we agreed is that we will add new generic ServiceMonitor to OOM (so not into the DCAE code) which will be able to handle multiple services. Here are some more details about the solution and the discussion we had: https://wiki.onap.org/display/DW/OOM+Meeting+Notes+-+2021-03-17. 
So we're not proposing or forcing any new solution but rather extending already existing one. I think both VES and HV-VES could benefit from this integration with Prometheus as they could be potentially a bottleneck in the system.

Lukasz - Thanks for the info, dint realize OOM change for integration were already implemented. Could you pls add reference for oom implementation and docs if any into the jira.
